results_by_model.output:
- Revenue grew 18% year-over-year to $4.2M, showing solid momentum for a company at this stage.
- The business is becoming more profitable, with net losses narrowing significantly from $620K to $380K in a single quarter.
- With $16.8M in ARR and a 2.1% churn rate, the company appears well-positioned for continued growth if it can maintain its recent new-logo momentum.

- The company grew revenue 18% year-over-year to $4.2M, reflecting healthy top-line momentum.
- Profitability is improving: the net loss narrowed from $620K to $380K, suggesting the business is trending toward breakeven.
- At $16.8M ARR with 2.1% churn, near-term revenue visibility looks stable, though sustaining the $1.4M in new-logo ARR will be the key growth driver to watch.

• Revenue reached $4.2M this quarter, up 18% from the same period last year.
• The company cut its net loss nearly in half — from $620K to $380K — signalling improving cost discipline.
• With $16.8M in recurring revenue and low churn at 2.1%, the outlook is cautiously positive if new customer acquisition holds.

- Revenue is growing strongly at 18% YoY, reaching $4.2M, indicating solid market demand.
- The company is on a clear path to profitability, with net losses shrinking by 39% in a single quarter.
- With ARR at $16.8M and churn below 2.5%, the business has a stable recurring revenue base, though continued investment in new logos will determine whether growth accelerates or plateaus.
